body:
### Problem

When running `vim.api.nvim_parse_cmd('echo &', {})`, the output contains an error:

`E112: Option name missing: &`



This happens since commit 72b0bfa1fb7e, added in #36055

### Steps to reproduce

nvim --clean
:=vim.api.nvim_parse_cmd('echo &', {})

Output:

``` lua
E112: Option name missing: &                                                                                                                                                                 
{                                                                                                                                                                                            
  addr = "none",                                                                                                                                                                             
  args = { "&" },                                                                                                                                                                            
  bang = false,                                                                                                                                                                              
  cmd = "echo",                                                                                                                                                                              
  magic = {                                                                                                                                                                                  
    bar = false,                                                                                                                                                                             
    file = false                                                                                                                                                                             
  },                                                                                                                                                                                         
  mods = {                                                                                                                                                                                   
    browse = false,                                                                                                                                                                          
    confirm = false,                                                                                                                                                                         
    emsg_silent = false,                                                                                                                                                                     
    filter = {                                                                                                                                                                               
      force = false,                                                                                                                                                                         
      pattern = ""                                                                                                                                                                           
    },                                                                                                                                                                                       
    hide = false,                                                                                                                                                                            
    horizontal = false,                                                                                                                                                                      
    keepalt = false,                                                                                                                                                                         
    keepjumps = false,                                                                                                                                                                       
    keepmarks = false,                                                                                                                                                                       
    keeppatterns = false,                                                                                                                                                                    
    lockmarks = false,                                                                                                                                                                       
    noautocmd = false,                                                                                                                                                                       
    noswapfile = false,                                                                                                                                                                      
    sandbox = false,                                                                                                                                                                         
    silent = false,                                                                                                                                                                          
    split = "",                                                                                                                                                                              
    tab = -1,                                                                                                                                                                                
    unsilent = false,                                                                                                                                                                        
    verbose = -1,                                                                                                                                                                            
    vertical = false                                                                                                                                                                         
  },                                                                                                                                                                                         
  nargs = "*",                                                                                                                                                                               
  nextcmd = ""                                                                                                                                                                               
}                    
```

### Expected behavior

No E112: Option name missing: &  

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

NVIM v0.12.0-dev-1433+g72b0bfa1fb

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

no

### Operating system/version

arch linux

### Terminal name/version

kitty 0.46.1

### $TERM environment variable

xterm-kitty

### Installation

build from repo

comment_data.body: Also happens with some other partial expressions like `echo '`, which leads to `E115: Missing quote: '`.

labels.description: wrong behavior that was introduced in a previous commit (please bisect)
labels.name: bug-regression

labels.description: issue has been tracked to a specific commit
labels.name: has:bisected

title: vim.api.nvim_parse_cmd shows error when passed `echo &`
